# Hartron Skill Centre, Hisar

> NCVET-approved Govt. of Haryana franchise computer training institute in Hisar, Haryana. Established 1999. Has trained 20,000+ students. Authorised franchisee of HARTRON (Haryana State Electronics Development Corporation Limited).

## Key facts
- Established: 1999
- Years of operation: 27+
- Total students trained: 20,000+
- Total courses offered: 21
- Recognition: NCVET-approved, NSQF-aligned, Government of Haryana
- Head: Bhupender Singla
- Address: Between Nagori Gate & Bus Stand, Near Gurudwara, Hisar, Haryana 125001
- Phone: +91-92158-38058, +91-98120-86917
- Hours: Monday–Saturday, 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM
- Areas served: Hisar, Hisar Cantt, Balsamand, Mirzapur, Khedar, Agroha, Mangali, Nalwa, Sisai, Adampur, Hansi, Uklana, Barwala, Bhuna, Narnaund and surrounding villages within 40 km of Hisar

## Flagship Courses
- [CCA — Certificate in Computer Applications](https://hartronhisar.in/courses/cca): 12-month flagship course. Grants exemption from SETC written test for Clerk Post in Haryana government.
- [CDA — Certificate Diploma in Accounting](https://hartronhisar.in/courses/cda): 12-month accounting course with Tally and GST.
- [Python Programming](https://hartronhisar.in/courses/python): Modern programming foundation for AI, data science, web development.
- [CIFT — Certificate in IT & Financial Tools](https://hartronhisar.in/courses/cift): Combined IT and finance career track.
- [CCBA — Certificate Course in Business Applications](https://hartronhisar.in/courses/ccba): Business-focused computer skills.
- [FC — Foundation Course in Computers](https://hartronhisar.in/courses/fc): Entry-level for beginners.

## All Courses
- [CCA — Certificate in Computer Applications](https://hartronhisar.in/courses/cca)
- [CDA — Certificate Diploma in Accounting](https://hartronhisar.in/courses/cda)
- [ACCA — Advance Certificate in Computer Applications](https://hartronhisar.in/courses/acca)
- [CHNA — Computer Hardware & Networking Assistant](https://hartronhisar.in/courses/chna)
- [DMA — Digital Marketing Assistant](https://hartronhisar.in/courses/dma)
- [CDP — Certificate in Designing & Publishing](https://hartronhisar.in/courses/cdp)
- [CWT — Certificate in Web Technology](https://hartronhisar.in/courses/cwt)
- [C Programming](https://hartronhisar.in/courses/c)
- [C++ with OOPS](https://hartronhisar.in/courses/cpp)
- [FC — Foundation Course](https://hartronhisar.in/courses/fc)
- [Java Programming](https://hartronhisar.in/courses/java)
- [Python Programming](https://hartronhisar.in/courses/python)
- [CIFT — Certificate in IT & Financial Tools](https://hartronhisar.in/courses/cift)
- [CCBA — Certificate Course in Business Applications](https://hartronhisar.in/courses/ccba)
- [CSD — Certificate in Software Development](https://hartronhisar.in/courses/csd)
- [VB.Net — Visual Basic .NET](https://hartronhisar.in/courses/vbnet)
- [AutoCAD Design](https://hartronhisar.in/courses/autocad)
- [Tally with GST](https://hartronhisar.in/courses/tally)
- [DTP — Desktop Publishing](https://hartronhisar.in/courses/dtp)
- [PHP with MySQL](https://hartronhisar.in/courses/php)
- [Android App Development](https://hartronhisar.in/courses/android)

## Key Pages
- [Home](https://hartronhisar.in/): Overview and featured courses
- [About](https://hartronhisar.in/about): History, head's message, three pillars
- [Courses](https://hartronhisar.in/courses): All 21 courses with filters
- [Gallery](https://hartronhisar.in/gallery): Classrooms and student life
- [Contact](https://hartronhisar.in/contact): Enquiry form, map, hours
